title: U.S. offers no help with Iran war’s fallout, Thai foreign minister says
summary_full: “This war should not have taken place,” Sihasak Phuangketkeow said in an interview, adding that Thailand is approaching Russia and China amid its economic crisis.
summary_public: “This war should not have taken place,” Sihasak Phuangketkeow said in an interview, adding that Thailand is approaching Russia and China amid its economic crisis.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: Thailand is approaching Russia and China amid its economic crisis.
